name: Gmail
description: Adds Gmail search, read, and draft creation tools for approved threads using direct Gmail REST calls. It never sends email.

env.description: Fallback Google OAuth client ID used when the Gmail client_id setting is not configured.
Fallback Google OAuth client secret used when the Gmail client_secret setting is not configured.

settings.label: Google OAuth client ID
settings.description: OAuth client ID for exchanging the Gmail refresh token. Falls back to GMAIL_CLIENT_ID.

settings.label: Google OAuth client secret
settings.description: OAuth client secret for exchanging the Gmail refresh token. Falls back to GMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET.

settings.label: Gmail refresh token
settings.description: Google OAuth refresh token with Gmail scopes for the enabled access groups.

settings.label: Default Gmail From address
settings.description: Optional default From address for created drafts. Gmail must allow the signed-in account to send as this address.

access.name: Gmail - Read
access.description: Expose Gmail search and message-read tools to selected threads.

tools.name: gmail_search
tools.description: Search Gmail messages with Gmail query syntax. Parameters: query string, optional max_results 1-10, optional include_spam_trash.

tools.name: gmail_read
tools.description: Read one Gmail message by id and return headers plus a bounded text body. Parameters: id or message_id, optional max_body_chars 1000-20000.

access.name: Gmail - Drafts only
access.description: Expose Gmail draft creation to selected threads. This access group cannot send email.

tools.name: gmail_create_draft
tools.description: Create a Gmail draft from to/cc/bcc, subject, body, optional body_format plain/html, and optional from. Does not send the draft.
